prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `6cbe9eb8`.
codex_response:
Implemented `6cbe9eb8` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6cbe9eb8/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6cbe9eb8/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6cbe9eb8/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6cbe9eb8/notes.md). The corrected rule is: infer the wallpaper period, separate picture colors from wallpaper colors, take the largest monochrome component for each picture color, convert each component bbox into either a border or a filled rectangle, then rebuild the hidden image by nesting those rectangles bottom-left inside one another.

I discarded the summary hint and documented the mismatch in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_6cbe9eb8/notes.md), because the official task is not a simple crop of all deviations. The generator stays on-family by using official-like wallpaper motifs and color families, constructing the latent nested-rectangle output explicitly, then displacing the rectangle fragments across the wallpaper in the same staggered way seen in the puzzle. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed: `4/4` official examples, `1000` built examples, and `1000/1000` generated examples verified. I also checked [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/previews/preview_01.png), and it looks on-family.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/6cbe9eb8/previews/preview_03.png).
